Ffl’fi'fir l0-8—l959 r at am fit a: 999833 wean 26—!2-1990 a-st um fit an 698$3_fiTfiFrll-2—l993 m an en he fi-zoalsfl fifltw 7-6-l99l um HF en fin fi-areass ant? 30—4—1992 lb at am he s-Illasl arfis'22—2-I994 12- m- wr- tar- 11- 6128373 m‘firur 9-3—1994 arms-ad IJ-st at he a: 73:838 arfim'30—9—I994 I4- “F mm fit a: 573s8 arfimr 7-2-,995 I5-sm at he d-5333s8 anmw 13—9w1995 MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th December, 1995 G.S.R. 793(E).——Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that the use of fixed dose combination of Hydroxyquinoline group of drugs with any other drug except for preparations meant for external use is likely to involve risk to human beings or the said fixed dose combination does not have the therapeutic value claimed or purported to be claimed for them or contain ingredients and in such quantity for which there is no therapeutic justification and whereas the Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale and distribution of the said fixed dose combination in the public interest: Now therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 26—A of Drugs and Cosmetic Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare number G.S.R. 578(E), dated the 23rd July, 1983, namely :—— In the Table appended to the said notification, for serial number 13 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and the entry shall be substituted, namely :a— "l3. Fixed dose combination of Hydroxyquinoline group of drugs with any other drug except for preparations meant for external use." [No. x. llOl4/5/95-DMS & PFA] SHAILAJA CHANDRA, Jt.
